chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 245 - وَقَالَ أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «لاَ تَدْخُلُوا اَلْحَمَّامَ عَلَى اَلرِّيقِ وَ لاَ تَدْخُلُوهُ حَتَّى تَطْعَمُوا شَيْئاً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.245 - Abu Al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
'Do not enter the bathhouse on an empty stomach, and do not enter it until you have eaten something.'
